overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval harbor town. The character moves from a sunny waterfront promenade up stone stairs, through narrow cobblestone streets with NPCs, and into a central courtyard approaching a town gate, passing historic European-style timber and stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: harbor waterfront promenade with wooden docks

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the waterfront, passing wooden docks and harbor structures on the left

notable_agents.action: shirtless man with tattoos standing near wooden posts, watching Geralt pass by

entered.detail: calm harbor water with distant buildings visible across the bay
wooden pier structures extending into the water with mooring posts
tall wooden crane structure used for loading cargo onto ships
medieval stone and timber-framed buildings with red tiled roofs lining the waterfront
stacks of wooden barrels and cargo crates on the dockside

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sunny waterfront promenade with the harbor on his left and historic buildings on his right. The cobblestone path is lined with wooden docks, cargo barrels, and a large crane structure visible in the distance. A shirtless man stands near the water's edge as Geralt passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairway connecting waterfront to upper town level

events.description: Geralt begins ascending stone stairs from the waterfront up to the main town level

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbing weathered stone stairs from the harbor up to the upper street level, moving away from the water

entered.detail: weathered stone steps leading upward from the waterfront to the town above
rough wooden fence railing along the edge of the stairway

segments.scene_description: The path transitions to a stone stairway ascending from the waterfront. Geralt climbs the steps bordered by a wooden railing on the right, with the harbor water and crane now visible to the left and behind. The stone buildings of the waterfront recede into the background as the character gains elevation.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone street between tall stone buildings

events.description: children run past Geralt playing in the street, increasing pedestrian activity in the narrow alley

agents.ego_description: Geralt navigating through narrow town streets, passing children playing and townspeople going about their daily business

notable_agents.action: child in blue dress running past Geralt toward the harbor
woman in brown dress walking ahead on the cobblestone path

entered.detail: tall stone building facades with arched wooden doorways and small shuttered windows
wooden table with goods displayed near a building entrance
large coil of heavy rope on a wooden stand

segments.scene_description: Geralt moves through narrow cobblestone streets flanked by tall stone buildings with arched doorways. The street features market stalls and rope coils, with children running past and townspeople walking about. The harbor is no longer visible as the character moves deeper into the town's interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: open town courtyard approaching main gate

events.description: narrow street opens into wider courtyard with grass patches and larger stone structures visible ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the open courtyard toward a large stone gate, passing wooden fences and market stalls on either side

notable_agents.action: man in leather apron standing near wooden structure, watching Geralt approach

entered.detail: large stone archway gate with heavy wooden doors, entrance to the inner keep
simple wooden picket fence lining the left side of the path
patches of grass and moss growing between the cobblestones in the open area
tall cylindrical stone tower with conical red roof

segments.scene_description: The narrow street opens into a wide sunlit courtyard with patches of grass between the cobblestones. A large stone gate with wooden doors stands ahead as the destination, flanked by a stone tower on the left and timber-framed buildings on the right. Geralt walks past wooden fences and a townsman standing near a market stall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright harbor promenade that ascends and winds through a dense medieval town into a wide central courtyard. It begins along a sunny waterfront path lined with cargo barrels and wooden docks, passing a man by the water's edge as a large crane looms in the distance. As the terrain shifts, the camera follows Geralt up a stone stairway, leaving the harbor and its receding buildings behind to gain elevation. The scene then narrows into cobblestone streets flanked by tall stone buildings and market stalls, where the open air of the coast is replaced by the bustle of townspeople and children. Finally, the cramped alleyway opens into a sunlit courtyard with patches of grass, leading the camera past timber-framed houses toward a massive stone gate and tower.
